content:
Here's my morning check summary:

---

**☀️ Morning Nudge — Wednesday July 1, 2026 @ 07:00 SAST**

**1. Shopify Orders**
❌ **Can't reach Shopify** — no API key or integration script found in the current setup. This needs a Shopify Admin API access token configured before I can pull orders. No visibility on last night's unfulfilled orders.

**2. AgentMail**
❌ **API not responding** — hitting `api.agentmail.to/v0/` returns 404 on all routes. The API key in TOOLS.md may be stale or the service endpoint has changed. Both charlie@ and ceo@ addresses need manual verification at [app.agentmail.to](https://app.agentmail.to) for now.

**3. Naledi's Content Queue**
✅ **Repo pulled clean** — `/root/robusca/robusca-brain/` updated successfully (new NotebookLM briefs and posting calendar added). Would need to check the `studex-naledi-content/` workspace for pending approvals.

**4. Meta Ad Spend**
🔴 **Facebook token EXPIRED** — the Page access token expired **June 27, 2026** and needs re-authentication before Meta Ads Manager data can be accessed via API. You'll need to regenerate the token at [facebook.com](https://developers.facebook.com) or through the Meta Business Suite.

---

**What needs your attention:**
- 🔴 **Meta token refresh** — high priority, ads data is dark
- 🔴 **AgentMail API** — needs verification of correct endpoint/credentials
- 🟡 **Shopify** — needs API credentials to enable order monitoring

Everything else is running. Let me know if you want me to dig into any of these right now.

EMAIL_DRAFT:
**From:** robusca@agent.studexmeat.com
**To:** tumelo@studexmeat.com
**Subject:** 📋 StudEx Morning Brief — 2026-07-01

---

Good morning, Tumelo. Here is your StudEx Meat morning briefing for Wednesday, 1 July 2026.

---

📦 **1. ORDERS & REVENUE — 30 June 2026**
• Orders fulfilled: NO DATA — Shopify Admin API token still missing. Zero visibility.
• Revenue: Unknown. This is our most critical operational blind spot.
• ⚠️ Action required: Provide Shopify Admin API token (scopes: `read_orders`, `read_products`).

---

📱 **2. CONTENT POSTED vs PLANNED**
• Youth Day (16 June) content window CLOSED 30 June. Naledi had drafted content queued, but Facebook/Meta access token expired 27 June — we were unable to verify whether posts went live.
• Facebook User Token and Page Token both expired — no page data accessible.
• Ad campaigns: NO DATA — Meta Marketing API not connected.
• ⚠️ Action required: Refresh Facebook User Token and Page Token urgently.

---

🛠️ **3. WHAT WAS BUILT / COMPLETED**
• OS image built and staged on VM (2026-06-30, 01:00).
• Credential onboarding checklist and VM pre-flight script prepared by Robusca — ready to execute once tokens are available.
• AgentMail DNS MX records for `send.studexmeat.com` still show INVALID.

---

⚡ **4. TODAY'S TOP 3 PRIORITIES**
1. **[Tumelo]** Refresh Facebook & Meta tokens — unblocks all social and ad visibility.
2. **[Tumelo]** Provide Shopify Admin API token — eliminates biggest operational blind spot.
3. Configure AgentMail DNS (MX records) — enables automated email delivery.

---

🚧 **5. BLOCKERS REQUIRING YOUR ACTION**
| Blocker | Owner |
|---|---|
| Shopify Admin API token | Tumelo |
| Facebook / Page token refresh | Tumelo |
| Meta Marketing API (Ad Account) | Tumelo |
| AgentMail DNS MX records | Tumelo |
| Youth Day content publish status | Naledi / Robusca |

---

Robusca is ready to execute the moment credentials are in.

— *Robusca, Chief of Staff | StudEx Meat*

☀️ **Morning Nudge — 07:00 SAST Summary (Mon 29 Jun 2026)**

Checked the following:

1. **Shopify Orders** ⚠️ — No Shopify API credentials found in my tools. Cannot pull last night's orders. If you share the Shopify store URL + API token, I can wire this up.

2. **AgentMail** ❌ — Both `charlie@agent.studexmeat.com` and `ceo@agent.studexmeat.com` returned `NotFoundError` on every API endpoint. The associated domains (`send.studexmeat.com` and `stud.exchange`) also show DNS MISSING in the config — so the inboxes aren't provisioned yet. You'll need to verify the AgentMail setup before I can read those accounts.

3. **Naledi's Queue** ⚠️ — No content approval queue system is wired up yet. I don't have access to a CMS or content management tool for StudEx Meat. If there's a Notion, Google Sheet, or other queue I should be polling, let me know.

4. **Ad Spend** ⚠️ — Meta ad account credentials are on file (Facebook Page token), but Meta's Graph API for ad reporting requires an App with `ads_read` permission and a Business Manager setup. Not currently connected. I can set this up if you have a Meta Business App ID and ad account ID.

---

**Action items to complete the morning nudge:**
- Shopify API token (or Shopify store URL so I can use their REST/GQL API)
- AgentMail domain DNS confirmed — check app.agentmail.to
- Content queue location (Notion/Sheet/CMS URL)
- Meta Business App + Ad Account ID for ad reporting

Once those are in place, I'll have a proper morning briefing ready for you at 7 AM SAST daily. 🗓️

**Morning Brief — Task Complete ✅**

- Read last logged daily file: `2026-06-27.md`
- June 28 session: **none found** (flagged in briefing)
- AgentMail API returned 404 on both `/v1/` and `/v0/messages` — `send.studexmeat.com` domain is unconfigured (DNS MISSING per TOOLS.md), so the send failed
- **EMAIL_DRAFT output above** — Robusca (main session) can deliver it manually or via another channel

**Top action for Tumelo today:** Approve and send the PROWTC Rwanda pricing email — that deal is the most time-sensitive open item.

**🌤️ Midday Check-In — Monday 29 June 2026, 12:00 SAST**

Hey Tumelo — here's your midday rundown:

---

**1. 📦 Orders Today**
❌ **Can't check — Shopify token still missing.**
The Shopify agent is built and ready at `studexmeat.myshopify.com` but the `SHOPIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN` env var isn't set on the VM. Zero order visibility until that's configured. This is your #1 blocker.

---

**2. 📝 Content Scheduled?**
❌ **Naledi can't post** — Meta token expired 22 June. She needs a fresh Facebook User Token to reactivate.
✅ Blotato is empty (0 posts queued, 0 accounts connected — FB/IG still need connecting in the Blotato dashboard).
✅ FeedHive check failed — may need re-auth.

---

**3. 📊 Inventory**
❌ No inventory file found on the VM and no Shopify token to pull live stock levels. No alert possible right now.

---

**4. 🎯 ONE thing I can handle right now**

**Get the Shopify Admin API token** — this unblocks your entire order workflow:
- Go to: `studexmeat.myshopify.com` → Settings → Apps → Develop apps → Create app → get Admin API access token with `read_orders` + `read_products` scopes
- Once you share it with me, I'll wire it into the Orgo VM env and activate the Shopify agent + n8n order alert workflow

That one step gives you live orders, inventory visibility, and N8n automations firing again. Everything else is downstream of this.

---

I'm here until 8PM SAST — what do you need? 🐂

GitHub push failed (PAT not working for HTTPS push). The commit is local — noted. Here's the full standup delivery:

---

**📋 Evening Standup — 2026-06-29 | 17:00 SAST**

---

**1. Orders Fulfilled & Revenue**
No data — Shopify access token not configured in this session. Cannot pull live orders or revenue.
→ *Action: Provide Shopify access token to enable automatic tracking*

---

**2. Content Posted**
No live data accessible. Pipeline exists:
- Naledi (CMO agent) ready for content creation/scheduling
- Blotato API confirmed working (2026-06-27) but **0 accounts connected** — needs FB/IG linked inside Blotato dashboard
- Facebook page (StudEx Meat — 2,544 fans) posting access confirmed
→ *Action: Tumelo — connect FB/IG inside Blotato dashboard*

---

**3. Ad Performance**
No data — Meta Ads API credentials not connected. Cannot report ROAS or spend.
→ *Action: Provide Meta ad account ID + access token*

---

**4. Tomorrow's Priorities (Tue 2026-06-30)**

| # | Priority | Blocker |
|---|----------|---------|
| 1 | DNS for stud.exchange (GoDaddy) | 🔴 Critical |
| 2 | Blotato FB/IG connect | 🟡 Partial |
| 3 | Shopify integration | 🔴 Revenue blind |
| 4 | Meta Ads API connect | 🔴 Spend blind |
| 5 | PROWTC follow-up (Svetlana) | Blocked by DNS |
| 6 | GitHub auto-sync | PAT needed |

---

**🗂️ Files Updated**
- `/workspace/memory/2026-06-29.md` ✅
- `/workspace/studex-obsidian-vault/daily/2026-06-29.md` ✅
- GitHub push ❌ (commit made locally, push failed — PAT issue)

☀️ **Morning Nudge — Tue 30 June 2026 | 07:00 SAST**

---

**1. Shopify Orders — 🔴 No visibility**
No Shopify API token. Can't pull last night's orders.
→ *Need: Admin API access token with `read_orders` + `read_products` scopes*

**2. AgentMail (charlie@ / ceo@) — 🔴 Offline**
API still returning `NotFoundError` on all routes. Domains `send.studexmeat.com` and `stud.exchange` — DNS still missing. These inboxes aren't provisioned yet.
→ *Need: DNS configured (MX + SPF + DKIM) in GoDaddy*

**3. Naledi's Queue — ⚠️ Status unknown**
Youth Day content window **closes TODAY** (June 30). Last known state: content drafted but Meta token was expired. No confirmation it went live.
→ *Action: Verify Youth Day posts went out before the window shuts*

**4. Meta Ad Spend — 🔴 No data**
No Meta Marketing API credentials. No spend, ROAS, or campaign performance accessible.
→ *Need: Meta Business App ID + Ad Account ID + `ads_read` token*

---

**⚡ Today's deadline:** Youth Month content must go live on Facebook/Instagram **today** — last day of June window.

---

Everything's been at the same blockers for over a week now. The three things only you can unblock:
1. **Shopify Admin API token** → revenue visibility
2. **GoDaddy DNS for send.studexmeat.com** → agent emails live
3. **Meta Ads API credentials** → ad performance data

What do you want to tackle first?

AgentMail API route is returning 404 — the integration isn't fully live yet. Here's the briefing as a draft:
